title: Sucafina Market Report — 13 April 2026
content: Coffee futures extended the early-April selloff into mid-April, with the active May contract settling around 300.65 US cents per pound. The curve remains in backwardation, which still points to nearby tightness, but the market is fragile after the move down from the low-320s. Recent news flow is mixed: Indian output estimates remain a mild supply headwind, while broader commodity headlines and weather-driven headlines keep volatility elevated. The key question now is whether the $3.00/lb area can hold on a closing basis or whether the market slips back toward the low-290s.
